description: Sidecar PowerPivot/data-model real-world variants used to harden evidence beyond the active external-oracle pack.

fixtures.notes: Official Microsoft Download Center sample ContosoPnL_Excel2013.xlsx from ContosoPnL_Excel2013.zip for Profit and Loss Data Modeling and Analysis with Microsoft PowerPivot in Excel. Workbook metadata reports Application=Microsoft Excel and covers a richer PowerPivot/data-model variant with xl/model/item.data, workbook connections, multiple pivot caches, multiple pivot tables, and slicer caches.
